zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Donnet於大約1405年出生在英國肯特時，她的父親James Donnet26歲，母親Margaret Cheyne22歲。她於1428年與John St Leger在英國肯特武爾可姆結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1442年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery Donnet于大约1405年出生在英国肯特时，她的父亲James Donnet26岁，母亲Margaret Cheyne22岁。她于1428年与John St Leger在英国肯特武爾可姆结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1442年之后。

nameMeanings.name: Donnet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Dunnett
meanings: Scottish: variant of Dunnet, a habitational name from Dunnet in Caithness.

English: from the Old French personal name Donet, Donat, from Latin Donatus (see Donat ). Donatus was the name of several Christian saints and was popular in France and Italy, whence it may have been brought to England.
English: habitational name from Downhead in Somerset or Donhead in Wiltshire, both named from Old English dūn ‘hill, down’ + Old English hēafod ‘head, end’.

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Donnet was born about 1405, in Kent, England, her father, James Donnet, was 26 and her mother, Margaret Cheyne, was 22. She married John St Leger in 1428, in Ulcombe, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died after 1442.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery Donnet est née environ 1405, à Kent, Angleterre, son père, James Donnet, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margaret Cheyne, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé John St Leger en 1428, à Ulcombe, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée après 1442.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery Donnet um 1405 in Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater James Donnet 26 und ihre Mutter Margaret Cheyne 22. Sie hat 1428 in Ulcombe, Kent, England John St Leger geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1442.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Donnet è nata il circa 1405 nel Kent, England, sua padre, James Donnet, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Margaret Cheyne, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato John St Leger nel 1428, nel Ulcombe, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì dopo il 1442.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery Donnetが約1405年にイギリスケントで生まれた時，父James Donnetは26歳，母Margaret Cheyneは22歳であった。1428年にイギリスケントウルコンベでJohn St Legerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1442年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Donnet(이)가 대략 1405년 영국 켄트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James Donnet(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Cheyne(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1428년 영국 켄트 울코브에서 John St Leger(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1442년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Donnet nasceu aproximadamente 1405, em Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, James Donnet, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Cheyne, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com John St Leger em 1428, em Ulcombe, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1442.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Donnet родилась около 1405 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени James Donnet было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Cheyne, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John St Leger в 1428 г. в местности улкомб, кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла после 1442 г.

sm.about 1405–after 1442: e tusa o le 1405–ina ua ma'ea le 1442

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery Donnet nació aproximadamente 1405, en Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, James Donnet, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Margaret Cheyne, tenía 22 años. Se casó con John St Leger en 1428, en Ulcombe, Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió después de 1442.
